title: ProofMeta License Request Payload
description: Payload schema for the OPEN envelope of a license request lifecycle. The outer envelope MUST validate against envelope.schema.json and MUST NOT include in_reply_to (OPEN is a root). See PROOFMETA_ANWEISUNG.md §3.6.

request_id.description: Consumer-generated, globally unique. UUID v7 recommended (sortable by time).

id.description: Consumer's DID. MUST match the envelope's author.

callback_url.description: Optional. Provider MAY push status updates here.

provider_id.description: Binds the request to one specific Provider. The Provider MUST reject envelopes whose provider_id does not match its own DID. Combined with unique request_id and signed timestamp, this closes replay.

item_id.description: Item identifier from the Provider's catalog.

license_type.description: One of the Manifest's license_types[].id values.

terms_hash.description: MUST match the Manifest's terms_hash for the chosen license_type.

resolver_preferences.description: Consumer's preferred resolver implementations per role. Same shape as Manifest 'resolvers'.
